name: 120"x60" Tablecloth White - Threshold™
description:
Grace your table with the timeless elegance of this White Tablecloth from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton, this rectangular tablecloth offers protection against spills, stains, and scratches. Designed in a white hue, it complements a variety of table settings, dinnerware, and decor styles, while the machine-washable design makes cleaning a breeze.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
